summary: Vertical video. Podium event recording: Dr. Mehmet Oz (CMS Administrator) speaks at a presidential lectern with Trump standing beside him in front of a TrumpRx.gov backdrop, discussing drug-price transparency. The clip uses a static single-camera shot with a long uninterrupted talking transcript and no music.
notable_text: TrumpRx.gov; Seal of the President of the United States
